{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"共鸣解放·飞雷诀·归一造成伤害时，此次伤害的暴击提升20%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765422708059.png","name":"百般法宝，借物打力","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"卜灵进入【"阴阳相生"】状态时，回复25点共鸣能量，该效果每24秒可生效1次。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765422514605.png","name":"符法通玄，神鬼咸听","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"【"五雷荡煞阵"】持续期间，队伍中的角色生命值低于50%时，立即回复350+150%卜灵攻击的生命值，该效果每24秒可生效1次。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765423220470.png","name":"召灵遣将，窥探天机","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"卜灵的治疗效果加成提升20%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765422924207.png","name":"索拉云游，气运加身","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"【"五雷荡煞阵"】生成时，立即对范围内所有目标附加6层【"电磁效应"】。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765423107220.png","name":"论坛禁言，速换马甲","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"【"雷法·三才合一"】状态持续期间，队伍中登场的角色获得的共鸣技能伤害加成效果提升至50%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1765423294616.png","name":"“天地混元雷符水帖天尊”","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4990","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1415","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"151","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"15.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"12.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"81.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"27.3%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625563297.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"8.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png"},{"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"36.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625436697.png"}],"equipPhantomAttributeList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4990","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625411169.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625640635.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"118.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625513563.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"50","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625555901.png","key":"10010-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"8.1%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625989439.png","key":"10010-2","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"15.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625349422.png","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"12.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766626216694.png","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"81.2%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625583038.png","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"27.3%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625385461.png","key":"18-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"8.6%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625555676.png","key":"19-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"26.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625505966.png","key":"35-1","valid":true}],"level":90,"phantomData":{"cost":12,"equipPhantomList":[{"cost":4,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"26.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625501297.png","key":"35-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"150","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1727419782081.png","name":"无归的谬误","phantomId":6000060,"phantomPropId":60000605,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤无归的谬误一部分的权能，对周围的敌人造成1次基于自身生命上限15.86%的衍射伤害，使自身共鸣效率提升10%，全队角色攻击提升10%，持续20秒。
长按声骸技能，可在震击结束后，消耗耐力持续进行攻击，每次造成基于生命上限1.58%的衍射伤害；结束长按时，触发最后一击，造成基于生命上限19.82%的衍射伤害。
技能冷却：20秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":3,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"32.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625324631.png","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"100","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716032170027.png","name":"冥渊守卫","phantomId":390077025,"phantomPropId":60000215,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为冥渊守卫施放跃击。命中时造成273.60%湮灭伤害，命中敌人后扣除自身10.00%的生命值，5秒后周期性回复自身生命值，共回复生命上限10.00%的生命值。

 技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031747170.png","name":"火鬃狼","phantomId":390070100,"phantomPropId":60000365,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤火鬃狼撕咬敌人，造成32.00%+64热熔伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031470277.png","name":"先锋幼岩","phantomId":390070051,"phantomPropId":60000015,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤先锋幼岩向前扑击，对路径上的敌人造成32.00%+64物理伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"bl","attributeId":3,"attributeName":"导电","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1765422851484.png","roleId":1307,"roleName":"卜灵","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623765816.png","starLevel":4,"weaponTypeId":5,"weaponTypeName":"音感仪"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"15185","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1807","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1258","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"57.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"255%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"277.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":35,"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"48.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625436697.png","sort":27000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623750423.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","roleId":1307,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1765422904147.png","skinId":81001307,"skinName":"混元玄装"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
进行最多4段的连续攻击，造成导电伤害。

重击·山雷颐
长按普攻，按从左到右顺序消耗高亮状态下的【卦象·艮】和【卦象·震】可施放重击·山雷颐，造成导电伤害。

重击·雷山小过
长按普攻，按从左到右顺序消耗高亮状态下的【卦象·震】和【卦象·艮】可施放重击·雷山小过，造成较少导电伤害，额外削减共振度。

重击·艮为山
长按普攻，按从左到右顺序消耗高亮状态下的【卦象·艮】和【卦象·艮】可施放重击·艮为山，回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值。

重击·震为雷
长按普攻，按从左到右顺序消耗高亮状态下的【卦象·震】和【卦象·震】可施放重击·震为雷，持续回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值，每秒回复1次，持续8秒。

重击·鬼门占卦
长按普攻时，若不足2枚【卦象】，则卜灵进入卜卦失败状态，消耗全部【卦象】并损失20%的当前生命值；当卜灵生命低于1%时，不消耗生命值。

空中攻击
消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击，造成导电伤害。

闪避反击
成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会施放普攻第3段攻击目标，造成导电伤害。
·施放闪避反击后一定时间内短按普攻，将会施放普攻第4段。

【卦象】获取规则
【卦象】上限4枚，达上限时，再次获取【卦象】，所有【卦象】将左移1格，最左侧【卦象】将被移除。
·普攻第2段造成伤害时获得【卦象·艮】。
·普攻第4段、空中攻击造成伤害时获得【卦象·震】。
·施放共鸣技能·遁影牵雷时获得【卦象·震】。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1765423161000.png","id":673,"name":"卦起雷动","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标，造成导电伤害，并持续牵引周围的目标。
·施放共鸣技能后，一定时间内短按普攻，将会释放普攻第四段。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1765423011746.png","id":674,"name":"遁影牵雷","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标，造成导电伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1765422812658.png","id":675,"name":"飞雷诀","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"攻击目标，造成导电伤害，并回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1765422646429.png","id":678,"name":"召劾鬼神","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"阴阳相生
拥有【少阴】和【少阳】时，卜灵进入【阴阳相生】状态，共鸣解放·飞雷诀替换为共鸣解放·飞雷诀·归一。

飞雷诀·归一
攻击目标，造成导电伤害，并在目标位置生成【五雷荡煞阵】，每2秒对范围内所有目标造成导电伤害，并添加2层【"电磁效应"】，持续24秒。【五雷荡煞阵】持续期间，队伍中的角色获得【雷法·一气初动】状态。
·【雷法·一气初动】状态持续期间，队伍中的角色施放变奏技能后，【雷法·一气初动】替换为【雷法·两仪交泰】。
·【雷法·两仪交泰】状态持续期间，使队伍中登场的角色共鸣技能伤害加成提升10%。队伍中的角色施放变奏技能后，【雷法·两仪交泰】替换为【雷法·三才合一】。
·【雷法·三才合一】状态持续期间，使队伍中登场的角色共鸣技能伤害加成提升25%。

【少阳】和【少阴】获取规则
·释放重击·山雷颐或重击·雷山小过后获得【少阳】。
